titleStmt.title: SII 9.369: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 369. (A.R. No. 732 of 1919.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE ISVARA TEMPLE AT NAGARURU, ALUR TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1176, Ānanda, Āshāḍha, śu. 11, Sōmavāra, corresponding to A.D. 1254 June 28 Sunday, not Monday, as stated. It belongs to the reign of the

1. The right side of the slab is broken away and lost. Yādava king Kannaradēva. His Mahāpradhāna Jōgama-Rāhuta, ruling over Sindavādināḍu is said to have made a gift of some sotra (land) for god Sōmanāthadēva's satra (feeding house).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāma
racāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mū
lastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . svasti śrī
matu yadhavanārāyaṇa pratāpa
cakravarti śrīkannaradēvarājyadaṁdu srīmanu
mahāpradhānaṁ sarvvādhikāri jōgamarā
hutaru siṁdavāḍināḍanāḷuttamire saka
varusa 1176 neya Ānaṁdasaṁvatsarada
Āśāḍa sudda 11 sōmavāradaṁdu srī
sōmanāthadēvara sotravanu dhārā
pūrvakavāgi dēvara sarvvamānya chatra ga 5 yikkuva
ṁ(vaṁ)tāgi biṭṭaru Āyivarūruḍeyaru sa
mastaprajegaḷa muṁde . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ
vā vō harēti vasuṁdharā saṣṭirvvaru
ṣasahasrāṇi miṣṭāyāṁ jāya
tē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.369 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
